meta.title: CrossFit training asset registry
meta.scope: Source map for a CrossFit training-plan agent that combines official CrossFit methodology, Chinese creator-note themes, public coach/athlete video sources, and safety guardrails.
meta.xiaohongshu_status: The user-supplied profile was retrieved through the local Xiaohongshu MCP. The stable query `CrossFit Scale 阿蛋` returned 22 results, including 12 creator-authored CrossFit notes plus adjacent community results. Direct note-detail extraction repeatedly failed for core notes with noteDetailMap lookup errors, so the agent stores title, interaction, and theme evidence and does not claim verbatim note coverage.

xiaohongshu_retrieval.profile_description: 中文CrossFit学习入口；持续分享CrossFit知识与训练理解；拆解训练逻辑。
xiaohongshu_retrieval.detail_extraction_status: Direct get_feed_detail failed for core note ids 6a2211a900000000350304dd and 69b01286000000002602f64d with noteDetailMap lookup errors; broader topic tracking stalled while loading comments; direct Playwright navigation to a note URL redirected to Xiaohongshu login.
xiaohongshu_retrieval.analysis_boundary: Use title, interaction, and theme evidence only unless future MCP runs retrieve full note bodies.

official_crossfit_methodology.title: CrossFit - What Is CrossFit?
official_crossfit_methodology.use_for: Definition of CrossFit as constantly varied functional movements performed at high intensity.

official_crossfit_methodology.title: CrossFit Workout of the Day
official_crossfit_methodology.use_for: Current and historical workout structure, scaling examples, and intended-stimulus reading.

official_crossfit_methodology.title: CrossFit Level 1 Training Guide
official_crossfit_methodology.use_for: Foundational methodology: mechanics, consistency, intensity; movements; programming principles.

official_crossfit_methodology.title: CrossFit Education Resources
official_crossfit_methodology.use_for: Current downloadable study materials, Level 1 and Level 2 guide references, and certification study links.

official_crossfit_methodology.title: CrossFit Level 2 Training Guide and Workbook
official_crossfit_methodology.use_for: Class structure, lesson planning, scaling, seeing and correcting faults, and benchmark recording practices.

official_crossfit_methodology.title: A Theoretical Template for CrossFit Programming
official_crossfit_methodology.use_for: Modal-domain and time-domain variation without random programming.

official_crossfit_methodology.title: CrossFit Essentials - Scaling
official_crossfit_methodology.use_for: Preserve intended stimulus while modifying load, reps, range of motion, and skill demand.

official_crossfit_methodology.title: CrossFit Essentials - Mechanics, Consistency, Intensity
official_crossfit_methodology.use_for: Safety and progression order for daily plans.

official_crossfit_methodology.title: CrossFit Journal - What Is Fitness?
official_crossfit_methodology.use_for: Broad, general, inclusive fitness and ten physical skills.

official_crossfit_methodology.title: CrossFit Exercises and Movement Demos
official_crossfit_methodology.use_for: Movement standards and substitutions for gymnastics, weightlifting, and monostructural work.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 阿蛋CrossFit笔记 profile
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Chinese CrossFit learning-entry positioning and training-logic decomposition.

chinese_creator_notes.title: CrossFit 的 Scale，不是降低难度而是……
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Scaling should preserve the training stimulus, not merely make a workout easier.

chinese_creator_notes.title: CrossFit 的不断变化不等于随机乱练
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Programming variety needs structure across modal domains, intensity, and time domains.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 阿蛋拆解｜你练的，根本就不叫CrossFit！
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Avoid reducing CrossFit to random fatigue, isolated strength, or generic HIIT.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 阿蛋拆解｜CrossFit训练，进步停滞的八大因素
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Diagnose plateaus through recovery, technique, intensity, volume, and limiter mismatch.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 阿蛋拆解｜最被忽略的进步驱动力：动作经济性
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Prioritize efficient reps and repeatable positions before adding volume.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 阿蛋拆解｜体能的底层逻辑：呼吸，才是核心能
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Use breathing control as a pacing and recovery signal.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 怎么同时让力量、举重、体操、体能都进步？
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Balance domains across the week instead of cramming all limiters into every day.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 阿蛋拆解｜请立刻停止无效的辅助训练！
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Accessory work must solve a visible limiter in the workout, not add random fatigue.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 阿蛋拆解｜为什么训练量总是被高估
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Do not equate more work with better progress; track quality and recovery.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 阿蛋拆解｜力量耐力卡住了：深度解读背后原理
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Strength endurance needs load selection, density, and pacing progressions.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 194｜如何调整倒立撑的强度
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Gymnastics scaling should adjust range, angle, volume, and fatigue exposure.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 为什么 CrossFit 不把摆动引体当作弊？
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Distinguish strict strength, kipping skill, and workout-specific efficiency.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 风阻开得越大，不代表你划得越强
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Erg setup should match athlete size, stroke mechanics, and target stimulus.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 真实课堂拆解：L4 教练如何设计T2B 专项热身
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Skill warm-ups should prepare the specific positions and rhythm of the workout.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 药球翻站，为什么是学习 Clean 的最好入口？
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Use medicine-ball clean progressions before complex barbell receiving positions.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 为什么别人两把到顶，你爬绳却特别费力？
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Rope-climb scaling should solve foot lock, pull timing, and grip fatigue.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 知识卡片｜硬拉起始位，为什么不是越直越好？
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Teach start-position mechanics by balance, bracing, and bar path rather than a single visual cue.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 知识卡片｜为什么节奏越稳，身体会更省力？
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Use pacing consistency as a skill, especially in cyclic and mixed-modal work.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 知识卡片｜为什么耐力选手要训练肠胃
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Longer sessions and competitions need fueling tolerance, not just engine work.

chinese_creator_notes.title: WOD拆解×会员成长×Scale路径 Toolkit上线
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Represent daily plans as WOD decomposition plus member growth and scaling path.

chinese_creator_notes.title: 什么都在练，为什么没有一起进步？
chinese_creator_notes.use_for: Avoid unmanaged concurrent training; decide the priority stimulus for each day.
